3095460.name: Astro Pig Soundtrack
3095460.description:
The official soundtrack for Astro Pig is comprised of three albums and forty-five completely original lo-fi tracks in total. Listen to chill beats, enjoy the catchy and experimental tunes of the gamescom latam's finalist in Best Audio, and explore uncharted space to the sound of world instruments, international beats, and over three different vocal sample's languages.

Music composed and produced by aurafauna.
